title: pelargonium × morifolium
intro: Pelargonium × morifolium, commonly known as sweet marjoram or sweet-scented geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the geranium family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural antiseptic to soothe cuts and wounds. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × morifolium include tea infusions, essential oil extracts, and topical creams, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing.
